headline: Can PTC Inc. (PTC)’s New AI Strategy Drive a Comeback?
summary: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) is among the most profitable software stocks to buy right now. As of June 30, PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) has a Buy rating from 61% of the analysts covering the stock, with a one-year median price target of $180, implying an upside potential of approximately 58%.
